title: Discovery Daemon Implementation
readmeBody: Implements the silent-until-fund discovery daemon CLI, services, identity ledger, graveyard, checkpoint, and audit path.
scientificQuestion: Can Sovryn run an autonomous discovery daemon that stays silent until a strict Fund Gate passes?
domain: Autonomous Discovery Daemon - Silent Until Fund
limitations: No Fund Gate has passed in this setup package.
The daemon implementation provides silent search state, identity, graveyard, checkpoint, and Fund Gate mechanics; it does not itself validate a discovery candidate.
Routine partial, weak, or promising-but-unvalidated candidates are intentionally not published as public results.
The local search state is resumable but bounded by available runtime in each invocation.
All external review, prize-significance, broad intelligence, adoption, legal, medical, wet-lab, unsafe, and universal claims are explicitly outside scope.
disclaimer: Autonomous Discovery Daemon setup result only. No Fund Gate has passed, no discovery candidate is externally review ready, and this package does not claim Nobel-level discovery, breakthrough, AGI, Einstein-level intelligence, external validation, external adoption, legal, medical, wet-lab, unsafe, universal truth, or global acceleration.
